html:
Exclusive to:

The Brain of Thought is a craftable Hat Item from the Shipwrecked DLC. It requires an Alchemy Engine or Sea Lab to prototype, and 1 Brainy Matter, 1 Jellyfish, and 2 Ropes to craft. It is used to access hidden crafting recipes that have not been prototyped, including Volcanic Tab and Ancient Tab items, which cannot be prototyped and typically require being near an Obsidian Workbench or Ancient Pseudoscience Station to craft, respectively. A Brain of Thought can be used to craft 4 items and /or Structures, after which it will disappear. Crafting a recipe with a Brain of Thought will not count as prototyping.

Tips

  • It can be helpful as a replacement for science or magic stations during Monsoon Season if they become flooded and non-functional.
  • In the Hamlet DLC, a Brain of Thought allows access to Ancient Tab, Volcanic Tab and City Planning Tab recipes at the same time, no matter in which world the player currently is.
  • In a Hamlet-compatible Reign of Giants or Shipwrecked world, the player can utilize the Brain of Thought to build Town Houses, My City Hall and most of the Pig Shops without ever entering Hamlet world through the Skyworthy.
  • Because you usually need to be near an Ancient Pseudoscience station to craft items in the Ancient Tab, this can be used as an alternative.

Trivia

  • The name may be a pun on the common saying "I lost my train of thought.".

Gallery

  • Wilson wearing a Brain of Thought.
  • Willow wearing a Brain of Thought.
  • Wolfgang wearing a Brain of Thought.
  • Wendy wearing a Brain of Thought.
  • WX-78 wearing a Brain of Thought.
  • Wickerbottom wearing a Brain of Thought.
  • Woodie wearing a Brain of Thought.
  • Wes wearing a Brain of Thought.
  • Maxwell wearing a Brain of Thought.
  • Wigfrid wearing a Brain of Thought.
  • Webber wearing a Brain of Thought.
  • Walani wearing a Brain of Thought.
  • Warly wearing a Brain of Thought.
  • Wilbur wearing a Brain of Thought.
  • Woodlegs wearing a Brain of Thought.
  • Wilba wearing a Brain of Thought.
  • Wormwood wearing a Brain of Thought.
  • Wheeler wearing a Brain of Thought.

"brainjellyhat"
“Two brains means double the ideas!”
–Wilson
“I feel smarter, but also grosser...”
–Willow
“Agh! Is making Wolfgang think!”
–Wolfgang
“Does this make my brain look big?”
–Wendy
“PROVIDES DOWNLOADABLE CONTENT”
–WX-78
“Bright ideas shape the future!”
–Wickerbottom
“I feel like a keener when I put it on.”
–Woodie
“I feel inspired.”
–Maxwell
“The schematics for a plethora of incredible inventions are in now contained within my brain!”
–Wagstaff
“My brain has the might öf my swörd!”
–Wigfrid
“It feels smart and squishy on our head.”
–Webber
“It's, like, blowing my mind!”
–Walani
“I can feel inspiration seeping into me! Wait, that's brain juice.”
–Warly
“A jelly ta rest upon me dainty head.”
–Woodlegs
“WILBA HATH SMARTS!”
–Wilba
“Smart head thing”
–Wormwood
“If it really made me smarter, I could figure out how it worked.”
–Wheeler
The Brain of Thought is a craftable Hat Item from the Shipwrecked DLC. It requires an Alchemy Engine or Sea Lab to prototype, and 1 Brainy Matter, 1 Jellyfish, and 2 Ropes to craft. It is used to access hidden crafting recipes that have not been prototyped, including Volcanic Tab and Ancient Tab items, which cannot be prototyped and typically require being near an Obsidian Workbench or Ancient Pseudoscience Station to craft, respectively. A Brain of Thought can be used to craft 4 items and /or Structures, after which it will disappear. Crafting a recipe with a Brain of Thought will not count as prototyping.
Tips[edit | edit source]
It can be helpful as a replacement for science or magic stations during Monsoon Season if they become flooded and non-functional.
In the Hamlet DLC, a Brain of Thought allows access to Ancient Tab, Volcanic Tab and City Planning Tab recipes at the same time, no matter in which world the player currently is.
In a Hamlet-compatible Reign of Giants or Shipwrecked world, the player can utilize the Brain of Thought to build Town Houses, My City Hall and most of the Pig Shops without ever entering Hamlet world through the Skyworthy.
Because you usually need to be near an Ancient Pseudoscience station to craft items in the Ancient Tab, this can be used as an alternative.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The name may be a pun on the common saying "I lost my train of thought.".

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Bộ Não Suy Nghĩ là một Vật Phẩm Mũ có thể chế tạo được từ DLC Shipwrecked. Nó yêu cầu Máy luyện kim hoặc Phòng thí nghiệm biển để tạo nguyên mẫu và 1 Vật chất trí tuệ, 1 Sứa và 2 Dây thừng để chế tạo. Nó được sử dụng để truy cập các công thức chế tạo ẩn chưa được tạo nguyên mẫu, bao gồm các vật phẩm Thẻ Núi lửa và Thẻ Cổ, không thể tạo nguyên mẫu và thường yêu cầu phải ở gần Bàn làm việc Obsidian hoặc Trạm Giả khoa Cổ đại để chế tạo. Bộ Não Tư Tưởng có thể được sử dụng để chế tạo 4 vật phẩm và/hoặc Công Trình, sau đó nó sẽ biến mất. Việc tạo ra một công thức bằng Bộ não Tư duy sẽ không…

Is making Wolfgang think! |wendy = Does this make my brain look big? |wx78 = PROVIDES DOWNLOADABLE CONTENT |wickerbottom = Bright ideas shape the future! |woodie = I feel like a keener when I put it on. |maxwell = I feel inspired. |wagstaff = The schematics for a plethora of incredible inventions are in now contained within my brain! |wigfrid = My brain has the might öf my swörd! |webber = It feels smart and squishy on our head. |walani = It's, like, blowing my mind! |warly = I can feel inspiration seeping into me! Wait, that's brain juice. |woodlegs = A jelly ta rest upon me dainty head. |wilba = WILBA HATH SMARTS! |wormwood = Smart head thing |wheeler = If it really made me smarter, I could figure out how it worked. |choose = woodie}} The '''Brain of Thought''' is a craftable [[:Category:Hats|Hat]] [[Item]] from the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC. It requires an [[Alchemy Engine]] or [[Sea Lab]] to prototype, and 1 [[Brainy Matter]], 1 [[Jellyfish]], and 2 [[Rope]]s to craft. It is used to access hidden crafting recipes that have not been prototyped, including [[Volcanic Tab]] and [[Ancient Tab]] items, which cannot be prototyped and typically require being near an [[Obsidian Workbench]] or [[Ancient Pseudoscience Station]] to craft, respectively. A Brain of Thought can be used to craft 4 items and /or [[Structures]], after which it will disappear. Crafting a recipe with a Brain of Thought will not count as prototyping. =={{pic32|prototype}} Tips == * It can be helpful as a replacement for science or magic stations during [[Monsoon Season]] if they become [[Flooding|flooded]] and non-functional. * In the ''[[Hamlet]]'' DLC, a Brain of Thought allows access to [[Ancient Tab]], [[Volcanic Tab]] and [[City Planning Tab]] recipes at the same time, no matter in which world the player currently is. * In a ''Hamlet''-compatible ''Reign of Giants'' or ''Shipwrecked'' world, the player can utilize the Brain of Thought to build [[Town House|Town Houses]], [[Swinesbury City Hall|My City Hall]] and most of the [[Pig Shops]] without ever entering ''Hamlet'' world through the [[Skyworthy]]. *Because you usually need to be near an Ancient Pseudoscience station to craft items in the Ancient Tab, this can be used as an alternative. == {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia == * The name may be a pun on the common saying "I lost my train of thought.". == {{Pic32|Blueprint}} Gallery == Brain of Thought Wilson.png|[[Wilson]] wearing a Brain of Thought.
